sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116142" key="w)kutoki/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὠκῠ-τοκία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n116142.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speedy delivery,</tr_> cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀξυτοκία</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhetor.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).133</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
